patch.value:
# Capability: Security & code scanning (living backlog)

Owns repository security posture work that previously had no capability home:
- Semgrep Code finding triage batches (first import: pm-oz8u, 40 findings from 2026-07-06 CSV — 6 High spawn-shell-true, 34 Medium prototype-pollution/non-literal-RegExp/dependabot-cooldown).
- Dependabot dependency hygiene (pm-2czc closed the 2026-07-06 unblock: @types/node 26, pnpm cooldown, codeql-action lockstep group).
- Secret guardrails and history-redact usage policy (see 2026-05-22 history-repair learning: never quote secret-pattern literals into pm text).
- Future CodeQL / scanner integrations.

Convention: each scanner import creates one batch Task parented here, with one Issue per platform finding (Semgrep ID as issue code) so findings stay individually triageable. Sibling epic pm-92if owns CodeFactor (maintainability) findings; this epic owns security-class findings.

Living backlog capability epic for repository security posture: Semgrep Code finding triage, spawn/shell and RegExp injection hardening, dependabot hygiene, CodeQL, secret guardrails. Created in ecosystem audit #12 after the 2026-07-06 Semgrep import (pm-oz8u, 40 findings) and the dependabot chore pm-2czc had no fitting capability epic. Duplicate check: pm search 'security code scanning' / epic list — no existing security epic.

All code-scanning findings (Semgrep/CodeQL/dependabot/secrets) are tracked as pm issues under this epic with source links and triage state; recurring scanner imports parent their batch tasks here; epic stays OPEN as a living backlog even at 0 open children.

Living backlog capability epic for repository security posture: Semgrep Code finding triage, spawn/shell and RegExp injection hardening, dependabot hygiene, CodeQL, secret guardrails. Created in ecosystem review #12 after the 2026-07-06 Semgrep import (pm-oz8u, 40 findings) and the dependabot chore pm-2czc had no fitting capability epic. Duplicate check: pm search 'security code scanning' / epic list — no existing security epic.
